topic: Demo Solar Co — HJT Technology Play

scenarios.name: Bear (悲观)
scenarios.trigger: Silicon feedstock oversupply + HJT cost reduction below target + Trade barriers escalate

scenarios.name: Base (基准)
scenarios.trigger: HJT penetration grows as expected + Electricity pricing reform lands

scenarios.name: Bull (乐观)
scenarios.trigger: Large-scale HJT procurement order + Efficiency breakthrough 26.5%

scenarios.name: Black Swan (极端)
scenarios.trigger: Perovskite achieves mass production / Company financial fraud exposed
